html:
Cut Grass is a renewable resource Item harvested from Grass Tufts found naturally in the world. It can be used on numerous starter recipes and in even more advanced items when refined into Rope.

Because Cut Grass is needed to craft Campfires and Torches, it is a valuable early-game resource to collect. A player who does not collect cut grass on their first day may have no means for making a fire at night.

Grass Tufts wither during Summer unless protected by an Ice Flingomatic. Cut Grass drops from all Tumbleweeds, making it renewable even if the player burns all the spawned Grass Tufts. In addition, it is also dropped by Grass Gators and Grass Gekkos (either startled or killed) and can be found in Ocean Debris.

Cut Grass is used to craft Telltale Hearts, Flares, Wardrobes and Friendly Scarecrows. Winona uses Cut Grass to craft Trusty Tapes. It is less useful as Beefalo food, restoring only 4 Health and 4.6875 Hunger.

“Cut grass, ready for arts and crafts.”
–Wilson
“Cut grass, ready for burning. Or maybe crafting.”
–Willow
“I made a pile of grass.”
–Wolfgang
“I like to kill small things.”
–Wendy
“PLANT MATTER”
–WX-78
“Some grass cuttings.”
–Wickerbottom
“I think I might be allergic to this.”
–Woodie
“The mundane stuff of the earth.”
–Maxwell
“I've never seen such tensile strength in a grass before!”
–Wagstaff
“A craftwöman's möst elemental resöurce.”
–Wigfrid
“We should be able to weave this, too.”
–Webber
“It makes a swishing sound when I walk.”
–Walani
“What shall I craft?”
–Warly
“Ye'll be helpin' Woodlegs later.”

“'TIS GRASS”
–Wilba
“Hair from friends!”
–Wormwood
“These are more useful when there's more of them.”
–Wheeler
“A fire waiting to happen.”
–Winona
“Oh, what I could weave!”
–Wortox
“It grass.”
–Wurt
“Look, I can make a whistle with it! PHHWEEEE!”
–Walter
“It's about as interesting as you'd imagine cut grass to be.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cỏ Cắt là một loại tài nguyên có thể tái tạo được, được thu hoạch từ các Búi Cỏ được tìm thấy tự nhiên trên thế giới. Nó có thể được sử dụng trong nhiều công thức nấu ăn ban đầu và thậm chí trong các vật phẩm cao cấp hơn khi được tinh chế thành Dây.
